blogPosts.title: Scalable E-Commerce Platform
blogPosts.excerpt: How I structured a maintainable storefront architecture with clean checkout flows, catalog indexing, and predictable component patterns.
content: This project started as a redesign initiative for a growing product catalog. The main challenge was balancing visual polish with predictable performance on slower devices.

I split the UI into reusable slices and introduced a clear section hierarchy, allowing product cards, filters, and checkout forms to share consistent states. This reduced regressions and made iteration faster.

On the technical side, I optimized media handling, reduced render churn on interactive lists, and simplified network payloads for high-traffic routes. The result was a cleaner experience and a much steadier conversion funnel.

blogPosts.title: Beyondtech: Building an End-to-End Remittance & Disbursement Ecosystem
blogPosts.excerpt: As a Senior Frontend engineer, I built Beyondtech's landing page, merchant dashboard, and admin panel for secure, global, and fully digital remittance and disbursement services.

inlineImages.alt: Merchant dashboard and transaction flow view

content: Beyondtech operates in remittance and disbursement, delivering global and digital money transfer services. In this project, I worked as Senior Frontend to keep the user experience consistent across the full product ecosystem.

In this case study, project1 represents the landing page (beyondtech.co.id), project2 represents the merchant dashboard (dashboard.beyondtech.co.id), and project3 represents the admin panel (admin.beyondtech.co.id). This mapping made it easier to align visual direction while keeping feature priorities clear for each app.

On the landing page, my focus was trust-building, service clarity, and strong call-to-action pathways. The information architecture was designed to communicate product value quickly to prospective merchants and partners.

On the merchant dashboard, I designed the end-to-end transaction flow to make remittance and disbursement actions clear, fast, and less error-prone. I collaborated closely with backend engineers on API contracts, transaction states, input validation, and edge-case handling under real network conditions.

On the admin panel, the primary users are superadmins and internal Beyondtech teams who monitor the full disbursement flow. I prioritized operational visibility through informative tables, precise filters, traceable transaction details, and status indicators that support monitoring and investigation workflows.

From a technical standpoint, I implemented reusable component architecture, clean state structures, and unified UI standards across all domains. This improved feature delivery speed without sacrificing consistency, and made Beyondtech one of the most strategic fintech projects in my portfolio.

blogPosts.title: Personal Developer Portfolio
blogPosts.excerpt: Building a personal brand experience that feels editorial, responsive, and memorable while keeping code quality production-ready.
content: The portfolio was designed to communicate both technical confidence and design sensitivity. I used a bright visual system with layered depth and subtle motion to avoid a flat presentation.
Content structure was treated like a product narrative: quick context first, then proof through projects, and finally a conversion-ready contact section. This improved flow across desktop and mobile.
I also prioritized maintainability by centralizing reusable design primitives and simplifying component contracts. The final result is easier to evolve while staying visually cohesive.
